title: Nuclearcraft Neohaul
description: A port of Nuclearcraft Overhaul to Neoforge 1.21.1
body:
A port of Nuclearcraft Overhaul to Neoforge 1.21.1, the original for on MC 1.12.2 and earlier can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuclearcraft-overhauled).

For a remake of the Nuclearcraft pre-overhaul see [NuclearCraft-Neoteric](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuclearcraft-neoteric)

### Current Status:

#### Completed:
- Ore generation
- Collectors (Cobblestone, water and nitrogen)
- Music Discs
- Foods
- Solar panels
- RTGs
- Processors
- Turbines
- Fission Reactors (SFR and MSR)
- Multitool
- Machine Interface
- Heat exchanger
- Multiblock Machines
- Quantum Computer
- Wasteland
- CC: T Integration
- Integrations with JEI, EMI, Mekanism, Jade
- Radiation
- Tools and Armour

#### Currently Working on:
- Testing and optimizing
- Integrations with other mods (KubeJS / CraftTweaker)
